title: Refactor ISP-023 (ISP): GeneratorUntypedBase has methods related to capturing results and generator t...
apply_error: no patch blocks produced by LLM

detected_issue.description: GeneratorUntypedBase has methods related to capturing results and generator tracking, which might be unrelated to its core purpose.
detected_issue.reasoning: The GeneratorUntypedBase class includes methods like missingCaptureInstance() and getResultCapture(). These methods seem to relate to result capturing and generator tracking, which might be separate concerns from the core generator functionality. If a concrete generator implementation doesn't need these, it's forced to depend on them.
